sql_array: CREATE TABLE geometry_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, geom GEOMETRY);
INSERT INTO geometry_data (id, geom) VALUES (1, st_point(10, 20)), (2, st_point(5, 15));
SELECT id, st_x(geom) AS x_coord FROM geometry_data WHERE NOT (st_x(geom) IS NULL);
SELECT g1.id, st_x(g1.geom) AS x_coord FROM geometry_data g1 JOIN geometry_data g2 ON st_x(g1.geom) > st_x(g2.geom) WHERE NOT (g1.id = g2.id);
SELECT id, AVG(st_x(geom)) AS avg_x FROM geometry_data GROUP BY id HAVING NOT (avg_x > 0);
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id, st_x(geom) AS x_coord FROM geometry_data) AS sub WHERE NOT (x_coord < 10);
CREATE TABLE edge_cases (value VARCHAR(255), geom GEOMETRY);
INSERT INTO edge_cases (value, geom) VALUES (NULL, st_point(15, 25)), ('A', NULL), ('', st_point(0, 0));
SELECT ec.value, st_x(ec.geom) AS x_coord FROM edge_cases ec WHERE NOT (ec.geom IS NULL);
WITH geo_stats AS (SELECT st_x(geom) AS x_coord FROM geometry_data) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geo_stats WHERE NOT (x_coord < 0);
